description_long: This fountain features a circular, stone-textured base with a raised, thick-walled basin at its center. The basin is ring-shaped, with a wide, flat rim and a central pedestal supporting a smaller, round platform, possibly for a decorative element or water feature. The stonework appears uniform and slightly weathered, giving it a classic, utilitarian look suitable for public parks or plazas. The structure is robust and solid, with no visible water or intricate ornamentation. The overall design is symmetrical and functional, prioritizing durability and ease of maintenance. The muted beige and tan color palette enhances its integration into urban or landscaped environments.
description: A robust, circular stone fountain with a thick-walled basin and a central pedestal supporting a small round platform. The design is symmetrical, utilitarian, and features a muted beige color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular basin, thick rim, and central pedestal with a round platform clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, maintaining visibility of the basin and pedestal, with the stonework pattern on the base more apparent.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, similar to previous views, highlighting the uniformity of the basin and the central platform.
description_view_3: Final view, nearly identical to the others, emphasizing the symmetrical design and consistent stone texture.
attribute_ornamentation_details: There are no visible decorative motifs, engravings, or embellishments; the design is plain and functional with a focus on structural form.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular and ring-shaped with a wide, flat rim and a central pedestal supporting a small round platform. There are no visible tiers or compartments.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present.
